vocab.meaning: người luôn chạy theo mốt, nô lệ của thời trang
vocab.example: I wouldn't say I'm a slave to fashion, but I do enjoy keeping up with the latest sneaker releases.

vocab.word: cost an arm and a leg
vocab.example: I really admire designer leather boots, even though they often cost an arm and a leg.

vocab.meaning: đơn giản nhưng hữu dụng, chịu được va chạm (nói về giày bền)
vocab.example: For hiking, I prefer boots that are rough and ready rather than something that just looks good.

vocab.meaning: mang giày mới cho đến khi nó mềm ra và vừa chân
vocab.example: Leather loafers are my favorite, but it usually takes a week or two to break them in properly.

vocab.meaning: bận rộn, di chuyển liên tục
vocab.example: As someone who is always on the go, comfort is my top priority when choosing a new pair of kicks.
I love wearing bright, limited-edition trainers that help me stand out from the crowd.

vocab.meaning: bền bỉ, được chế tạo để sử dụng lâu dài
vocab.example: I'm a fan of sturdy work boots because they are clearly built to last, unlike some flimsy fast-fashion shoes.

vocab.meaning: thực tế, giản dị (phong cách giày không cầu kỳ)
vocab.example: My footwear style is quite down-to-earth; I usually just stick to classic canvas shoes that go with everything.

vocab.meaning: lên đường, bắt đầu chuyến đi (thường nói khi xỏ giày vào)
vocab.example: Once I lace up my favorite running shoes, I feel completely ready to hit the road for a morning jog.

vocab.meaning: theo kịp (xu hướng hoặc tốc độ)
vocab.example: It's hard to keep pace with the rapidly changing shoe trends, so I prefer timeless designs like Chelsea boots.
